gold.title: Animated Shader Hero
gold.reason: Full hero section with WebGL shader background, headline, subtitle, CTA buttons and trust badge — production-ready, drop-in hero for SaaS/business sites.

gold.title: Digital Aurora
gold.reason: Complete hero section wrapping a shader background with badge, headline, description, CTA buttons and micro-details — polished full-section component.

gold.title: Thermal Shader
gold.reason: Three.js-powered thermal effect with logo overlay; substantial codebase (39KB) suggesting a rich, configurable background section usable in premium hero layouts.

gold.title: Interactive Thermodynamic Grid
gold.reason: Mouse-reactive canvas heat-map grid with configurable resolution and cooling — striking, modern interactive background suitable as a hero backdrop.

gold.title: Isometric Wave Grid Background
gold.reason: CSS/canvas isometric wave grid — clean geometric aesthetic that works as a contemporary SaaS hero or feature-section background without heavy WebGL overhead.

gold.title: Flow Field Background
gold.reason: Smooth animated flow-field canvas background — versatile, lightweight, and visually compelling as a full-width hero or section backdrop.

gold.title: Aura Core
gold.reason: Self-contained OGL/WebGL fluid aura with inlined library — substantial and polished enough to serve as a full-screen animated hero background.

gold.title: Shader Background
gold.reason: Full-canvas WebGL shader background with mouse interactivity — clean API, production-quality for SaaS landing page heroes.

gold.title: Shader Background
gold.reason: Full-canvas WebGL shader background with comparable quality to the above — strong option for dark-theme SaaS or portfolio hero backgrounds.

gold.title: Shader Background
gold.reason: Well-implemented WebGL background with interactive mouse uniforms — production-ready as a full-screen animated section background.

gold.title: Living Fluid Background
gold.reason: Three.js fluid simulation loaded dynamically — visually striking full-screen background suitable for premium product landing pages.

gold.title: Sdf Dreamscape
gold.reason: SDF-based raymarching shader with hero keywords and strong visual depth — distinctive background for design-forward SaaS sites.

silver.title: Interactive Shader
silver.reason: Mouse-interactive shader with good code size — useful background effect but lacks full hero structure.

silver.title: Aurora Borealis Shader
silver.reason: Clean aurora effect — versatile as a hero background for tech or creative studios, though effect-only without section markup.

silver.title: Aurora Flow Shader
silver.reason: Smooth flowing aurora — polished effect usable as a premium background, slight redundancy with other aurora variants.

silver.title: Aurora Shader
silver.reason: WebGL aurora — quality background effect for dark-theme sites; another aurora variant.

silver.title: Colorful Wave Pattern 1
silver.reason: Vibrant animated wave pattern — good for creative/agency hero backgrounds.

silver.title: Flowing Waves Shader
silver.reason: Smooth wave shader — elegant, broadly applicable background for product sites.

silver.title: Liquid Shader
silver.reason: Liquid motion shader — popular aesthetic for modern SaaS; effect-only but strong visual appeal.

silver.title: Pulsing Geometric Dream
silver.reason: Animated geometric patterns — clean modern look, works for tech product backgrounds.

silver.title: Animated Shader Background
silver.reason: WebGL animated background with mouse interaction — solid quality, somewhat similar to other entries.

silver.title: Parallax Shader
silver.reason: Parallax depth shader — adds genuine scroll interest; good for feature sections.

silver.title: Light Up Shader
silver.reason: Illumination effect shader — subtle and versatile; works well as a section accent.

silver.title: Pattern Shader
silver.reason: Geometric pattern animation — clean and broadly applicable for SaaS backgrounds.

silver.title: Hexagonal Puls Shader
silver.reason: Hex grid pulse — on-trend tech aesthetic; useful for data/enterprise SaaS.

silver.title: Cybernetic Grid Shader
silver.reason: Grid-based cyberpunk shader — niche aesthetic but very polished for tech/fintech sites.

silver.title: Symmetry Engine
silver.reason: Symmetric WebGL animation — visually interesting, good for creative studio or AI product heroes.

silver.title: Dynamic Waveform
silver.reason: Audio-waveform-style animation — useful for music/podcast/media SaaS.

silver.title: Aether Flow
silver.reason: Fluid flow shader — elegant dark-theme background option.

silver.title: Mountain Scene
silver.reason: Stylized mountain scene — distinctive for travel/outdoor/adventure brands.

silver.title: Digital Glitch
silver.reason: Glitch effect shader — niche but strong for cybersecurity or gaming SaaS.

silver.title: Background Paper Shaders
silver.reason: Paper-texture shader using @paper-design/shaders-react — clean, minimal, great for editorial or documentation sites.

silver.title: Raidal 2
silver.reason: GLSL radial shader with mouse uniforms — quality WebGL effect; slightly abstract but usable as a background accent.

silver.title: Shader Animation
silver.reason: Canvas-based shader animation — competent background effect; somewhat generic.

silver.title: Shader Animation
silver.reason: Shader animation effect — functional quality background; redundant with other animations.

silver.title: Shader Lines
silver.reason: Line-based shader — minimal and clean; works as a subtle background texture.

silver.title: Lining Waves Shader
silver.reason: Line wave WebGL animation — tasteful for minimal/premium product sites.

bronze.title: Black Hole Shader
bronze.reason: Sci-fi black hole effect — highly niche, difficult to repurpose for standard business websites.

bronze.title: Fire Nightmare Shader
bronze.reason: Fire/horror aesthetic — very niche, limited to specific gaming or entertainment contexts.

bronze.title: Kaleidoscopic Shader
bronze.reason: Kaleidoscope pattern — too abstract and psychedelic for typical business/SaaS sites.

bronze.title: Martrix Shader
bronze.reason: Matrix rain effect — overused cliché; niche appeal for hacker/cyberpunk themes only.

bronze.title: Warp Tunnel
bronze.reason: Sci-fi warp tunnel — too niche and disorienting for general website use.

bronze.reason: Fantasy orb effect — too niche for business/SaaS; suited only to gaming sites.
